# Intervals for the closing probability functions when the first occupant enters in function of indoor temperatures (thermal comfort)
# rows: different room types 
# (1) Bathroom, (2) Bedroom, (3) Hallway, (4) Kitchen, (5) Living, (6) Office, (7) Toilet, Storage and (8) LivingKitchen
# columns: interval in which the closing probability function upon entering should be located. 
# (1) lower function and (2) upper function

0	2.208583674470151e-13*exp(7.44521893672604*x-10.8468461913396) + 0.019999108116571195
0	2.208583674470151e-13*exp(7.44521893672604*x-10.8468461913396) + 0.019999108116571195
0	2.208583674470151e-13*exp(7.44521893672604*x-10.8468461913396) + 0.019999108116571195
0	2.208583674470151e-13*exp(7.44521893672604*x-10.8468461913396) + 0.019999108116571195
0	2.208583674470151e-13*exp(7.44521893672604*x-10.8468461913396) + 0.019999108116571195
0	2.208583674470151e-13*exp(7.44521893672604*x-10.8468461913396) + 0.019999108116571195
0	2.208583674470151e-13*exp(7.44521893672604*x-10.8468461913396) + 0.019999108116571195
0	2.208583674470151e-13*exp(7.44521893672604*x-10.8468461913396) + 0.019999108116571195
